column1: # PURPOSE: Find whether the MLR optimum continues to drop below the current
# lock of 0.022. mlr_fine_scan confirmed a clean monotonically-decreasing curve
# from 0.054 down to 0.030; arbiter N=3 locked 0.022 (mean 1.4027).
# This sweep probes three values below 0.022: {0.018, 0.015, 0.010}.
#   - If any value beats 0.022 (mean < 1.4027): update MLR lock, probe further
#   - If all values are worse: 0.022 is confirmed optimum → permanent lock
# Same flags as mlr_fine_scan / arbiter (QK 5.5, WARMDOWN 0.64, TTT on,
# SLIDING on, EMA 0.995, SOFTCAP 20) so rows are directly comparable.

column2: QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.018 ITERATIONS=2000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3600 TIMEOUT_SECS=5400 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=42 NOTES=mlr_low_018
